summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of g-digital corporate website - found critical navigation routing issue but excellent homepage implementation

critical_bugs.issue: All navigation links change URL but content remains on homepage - URLs change correctly (/recursos, /contacto, /soluciones/*) but page content doesn't update
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access any pages except homepage - contact form, resource filtering, and solution pages inaccessible

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile hamburger menu doesn't auto-close when clicking navigation links

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test contact form validation and submission due to routing issue preventing access to actual contact page
Cannot test filter button functionality on recursos page due to routing issue

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all sections visible
Navigation dropdown menu (Soluciones) works with hover
All solution cards in bento grid are visible and clickable
CTA buttons have correct href attributes pointing to contacto.html
Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows all menu items
Hero section with proper gradients and glassmorphism effects
Footer links point to correct solution pages
Playfair Display and Manrope fonts load correctly
31 Phosphor icons load and display properly
Tailwind CSS styling applied correctly with proper spacing
Fade-in scroll animations trigger on scroll
Overall professional design quality with glassmorphism and bento grid layout
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix routing/navigation system - URLs change but page content doesn't update. This prevents access to all pages except homepage. Possible causes: SPA routing configuration, server-side routing issue, or static file serving problem. Also fix minor mobile menu auto-close behavior.
